name: multiplai
description: Personal Claude Code toolkit for context routing, continuous learning, session awareness, and memory management.
author: spikelab

workspace_dir.description: Workspace root. When set, memory/diary/now/learnings default to $workspace_dir/.multiplai/{...}. Falls back to ~/.multiplai/ if unset. Specific *_dir overrides win over this.

memory_dir.description: Directory for memory files (me.md, technical-pref.md, preferences.md). Defaults to <workspace_dir>/.multiplai/memory if workspace_dir is set, else ~/.multiplai/memory.

diary_dir.description: Directory for diary entries and session logs. Defaults to <workspace_dir>/.multiplai/diary if workspace_dir is set, else ~/.multiplai/diary.

now_dir.description: Per-project status (now-files) directory written by synthesize_now. Defaults to <workspace_dir>/.multiplai/now if workspace_dir is set, else ~/.multiplai/now.

learnings_dir.description: Per-day structured learnings directory written by extract_learnings. Defaults to <workspace_dir>/.multiplai/learnings if workspace_dir is set, else ~/.multiplai/learnings.

anthropic_api_key.description: Anthropic API key for fallback when Agent SDK is unavailable

catalog_model.description: Model to use for LLM-based catalog generation calls

catalog_model_diary.description: Override model for diary catalog generation (volume optimization). Empty = inherit catalog_model.

catalog_reasoning_effort.description: Reasoning effort level for catalog generation LLM calls (low, medium, high)

catalog_ttl_hours.description: Hours a generated catalog remains valid before being considered stale

diary_catalog_days.description: Number of days of diary history the diary catalog generator processes

enable_skills.description: Whether the skills catalog generator runs during catalog generation

skills_dir.description: Directory to scan for skills when enable_skills is true

enable_resources.description: Whether the resources catalog generator runs during catalog generation

resources_dir.description: Directory to scan for resources when enable_resources is true

memory_router.description: Routing strategy for context selection: 'token_overlap' (offline, fast) or 'llm' (Sonnet semantic match, one call per prompt). 'embeddings' is reserved for a future port.

skills.name: setup
skills.description: Onboarding interviewer — populates memory files from starter templates

skills.name: dream
skills.description: Manual AutoDream trigger — consolidates learnings into memory

skills.name: health
skills.description: Memory audit — checks completeness and staleness of memory files

skills.name: refresh-catalogs
skills.description: Manually regenerate catalog indexes with support for --force, --dry-run, and --only flags
